interpretation.not_redoing_h4c: H4c reliability map complete; H4d tunes τ and tests seed stability
interpretation.question: Are recovery_candidate worlds stable across seeds, and does τ prior tuning help sparse recovery without hurting clean recovery?

metric_definition.interpret_lt_1: posterior beta closer to pool center than generative outlier was
metric_definition.legacy_vs_true_mu: mean(|posterior_beta - true_mu| / |true_beta - true_mu|) — H4a/H4b pilot definition
metric_definition.primary: mean(|posterior_beta - posterior_mu| / |true_beta - posterior_mu|) over sparse geos
